creator: lippebsd@gmail.com
text:
Hi Artem,

I see you last patch about kmymoney, but you want to update it to an
development version. Would you of send us a new patch (kmymoney2-devel)
instead ? You can update it to 0.9.2 version too.

If you need anything, please let me know. Thanks! :)

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD Ports Committer
